TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciamengan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 718 buwan, 1,892 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 690 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 1,202 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciamengan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciamengan hya' ga Rinahem. tay mkyahu' na Ciamengan hya' ga Cealalupalantdlu. tay 'llaw na Ciamengan hya' ga Sawanengan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiameŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjuħoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rinaħem. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨealalupalant*lu. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕawaneŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciamengan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syuhong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 718 buwan, 1,892 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 690 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 1,202 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciamengan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciamengan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciamengan hya' ga Rinahem. tay mkyahu' na Ciamengan hya' ga Cealalupalantdlu. tay 'llaw na Ciamengan hya' ga Sawanengan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiameŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjuħoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rinaħem. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨealalupalant*lu. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiameŋan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕawaneŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
